zh.lifeSummary: 當Ellen Mallory於1380年出生在英國英格蘭坎布利其爾易斯勒哈姆時，她的父親John Mallory13歲，母親Jane Lane25歲。她於1406年與John de Swynnerton結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。她去世於1440年10月13日在英國英格蘭艾可享年60歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Ellen Mallory于1380年出生在英国英格兰坎布利其爾易斯勒哈姆时，她的父亲John Mallory13岁，母亲Jane Lane25岁。她于1406年与John de Swynnerton结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。她去世于1440年10月13日在英国英格兰艾可享年60岁。

nameMeanings.name: Mallory
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (of Norman origin): nickname for an unfortunate person, from Old French maloret, maloré, maleuré ‘ill-fortuned, unlucky’.

nameMeanings.name: Ellen
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a variant of Helen , although now no longer associated with that name. Initial H- tended to be added and dropped rather capriciously, leading to many doublets ( compare for example Esther and Hester ). It is also sometimes used as a short form of Eleanor , to which, however, it is unrelated.

variants.name: Eleanor
meanings: From an Old French respelling of the Old Provençal name Alienor. This has sometimes been taken as a derivative of Helen , but it is more probably of Germanic derivation (the first element being ali ‘other, foreign’ the second is obscure). The name was introduced to England by Eleanor of Aquitaine ( 1122–1204 ), who came from Aquitaine in south-west France to be the wife of King Henry II . It was also borne by Eleanor of Provence, the wife of Henry III , and Eleanor of Castile, wife of Edward I .

en.lifeSummary: When Ellen Mallory was born in 1380, in Isleham, Cambridgeshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, John Mallory, was 13 and her mother, Jane Lane, was 25. She married John de Swynnerton in 1406. They were the parents of at least 1 son. She died on 13 October 1440, in Essex, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 60.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Ellen Mallory est née en 1380, à Isleham, Cambridgeshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, John Mallory, avait 13 ans et sa mère, Jane Lane, avait 25 ans. Elle a épousé John de Swynnerton en 1406. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Elle est décédée le 13 octobre 1440, à Essex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 60 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Ellen Mallory 1380 in Isleham, Cambridgeshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater John Mallory 13 und ihre Mutter Jane Lane 25. Sie hat 1406 John de Swynnerton geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. Sie starb am 13. Oktober 1440 im Alter von 60 Jahren in Essex, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Ellen Mallory è nata il nel 1380 nel Isleham, Cambridgeshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, John Mallory, aveva 13 anni e sua madre, Jane Lane, aveva 25 anni. Lei sposato John de Swynnerton nel 1406. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Morì il 13 ottobre 1440, nel Essex, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 60 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Ellen Malloryが1380年にイギリスイギリスカンブリジェシュアイアイスレハムで生まれた時，父John Malloryは13歳，母Jane Laneは25歳であった。1406年にJohn de Swynnertonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼女は1440年10月13日にイギリスイギリスエセックスで60歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Ellen Mallory(이)가 1380년 영국 잉글랜드 캄브리지실르 이슬레함에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John Mallory(은)는 13세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Jane Lane(은)는 25세였다. 그녀는 1406년 John de Swynnerton(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1440년 10월 13일 영국 잉글랜드 에세스에서 60세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Ellen Mallory nasceu em 1380, em Isleham, Cambridgeshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, John Mallory, tinha 13 anos e sua mãe, Jane Lane, tinha 25 anos. Ela casou-se com John de Swynnerton em 1406. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. Ela faleceu em 13 de outubro de 1440, em Essex, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 60 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Ellen Mallory родилась в 1380 г. в местности ислэам, камбриджешир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени John Mallory было 13 лет, а матери, которую звали Jane Lane, 25. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John de Swynnerton в 1406 г. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Она умерла 13 октября 1440 г. в местности эссекс, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 60 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Ellen Mallory nació en 1380, en Isleham, Cambridgeshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, John Mallory, tenía 13 años y su mamá, Jane Lane, tenía 25 años.
